item.title: coldplay accidentally exposes astronomer ceo andy byron having an affair with his hr chief kristin cabot in boston last night.

item.title: Tadpoles grow back legs before front (5–9 weeks); once fully limbed, they're often called froglets.
item.description: RELEASE THE FROGLET! Source: https://youtube.com/shorts/CNn0WozOiDE
item.dc:creator: SteveMND

item.title: Poison Ivy - Cosplay
item.description: There is 100% a chance I have been carefully cultivating and shaping my back yard so that I could get these shots of Poison Ivy for this cosplay using real vines and plants... There is also a 100% chance I got up at 4am to get ready for this 7am shoot where I had about a 30 minute window of light to shoot this set... And it WAS SO WORTH IT! I also shot a youtube video in this look specifically about wigs, if you all are curious at my process at all! https://youtu.be/jwezn8gZhgk?si=PvGNty0F2B-xGroH
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Epstein Hoax vs US Embassy London
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.title: Good news everyone
item.description:
Just found out Gary Burghoff is still with us and celebrated his 82nd Birthday on May 24th
He always made me smile in MASH, and delivered that awful moment when he walked into the operating theater and said "I have a message. Lieutenant Colonel Henry Blake's plane was shot down over the Sea of Japan. It spun in. There were no survivors." Heartbreaking piece of TV history. Stay well Radar
item.dc:creator: joemac65

item.title: The little kicks are too cute
item.dc:creator: BratiBroti

item.title: $2 million to buy $429,000,000 of debt. Why do we let this charade of outrageous medical billing continue?
item.description:
This is your reminder that something is only a 'problem' if you make it a problem.
. AZ spent less than half of a hundredth of a percent to buy this debt. . 2,000,000 / 429,000,000 = .004662 . .
The money monster must be fed. The high priests of capitalism must be sated with our dollar offerings.
item.dc:creator: TheCunningLinguists

item.title: Memes/tomfoolery
item.description:
Bad Mario will always be voiced by Pedro Pascal in my head for the rest of my life.
I may hire a one-man band for my wedding.

item.title: Memes vol 585
item.description:
I had a leash as a kid- it was a monkey
I was the most obnoxious person ever when I was 14 so this wouldn’t go over well
Muh luh muh
Wuh luh wuh
The other day I saw the most astounding comment about the lost boys that said “wasn’t even close to any gay vibes in this movie” •_•
Froggy and Liza Jane tax
Nessie tax
Scruffy tax
Little baby Paulie tax
Bruce and Big Mama tax

item.title: GovBrief Today - What Happened #167
item.description: Trump spirals, and America responds. He’s backing off the Epstein client list, calling his base “weaklings,” and spinning wild Coke sugar rumors. A Reuters/Ipsos poll shows 69% think he’s concealing information today. Meanwhile, more than 1,600 Good Trouble Lives On protests are shaking every state with anger turned into action. This chaos is a sign that Trump’s playbook isn't working. Now’s your cue. Show up, speak out, stand firm today. And make connections to keep going after today. Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today, on Facebook, or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/senate-recission-approval-9billion 2. https://go.govbrief.today/nih-dangerous-research 3. https://go.govbrief.today/rio-grande-health-clinic 4. https://go.govbrief.today/noaa-rain-tool-halted 5. https://go.govbrief.today/eswatini-repatriate-exiled-men 6. https://go.govbrief.today/opm-telework-religious-accommodations 7. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-tests-firing-powell 8. https://go.govbrief.today/maurene-comey-fired 9. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-election-data-access 10. https://go.govbrief.today/revoke-green-card-unilaterally 11. https://go.govbrief.today/florida-wrongly-arrests-two 12. https://go.govbrief.today/900-former-justice-attorneys-bove 13. https://go.govbrief.today/jill-biden-aide-fifth 14. https://go.govbrief.today/abrego-garcia-ruling-delayed-again 15. https://go.govbrief.today/gop-senators-ed-funding 16. https://go.govbrief.today/arkansas-critical-race-theory 17. https://go.govbrief.today/admin-refuses-rif-list 18. https://go.govbrief.today/anti-union-order-allowed 19. https://go.govbrief.today/senior-hhs-aides-fired 20. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-slams-supporters-epstein 21. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-coke-cane-sugar 22. https://go.govbrief.today/bullet-train-funding-pulled Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/epstein-polling-brutal Yesterday's Top Story - https://go.govbrief.today/nih-coo-fired-contracts Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Walking today.
item.description: Today I worked on walking with ankle weights. It was the fastest time that I have done so far. I hope everyone is doing well.

item.title: REPORT: Trump's private calls over Epstein coverage sends chilling effect across conservative media.
item.description:
Source: https://www.beltway.news/p/trumps-private-calls-over-epstein?open=false#%C2%A7what-happened
Maurene Comey, a prosecutor that was on cases like Ghislaine Maxwell and Diddy, was fired by the DOJ. This needs to be reported on more to keep the Epstein fire burning red hot. https://abcnews.go.com/US/maurene-comey-fired-doj-southern-district-new-york/story?id=123817739
item.dc:creator: Mirrormancer

item.title: LLM'S are the worst tech development since DRM
item.description: Stop killing the planet!
item.dc:creator: Pilgrymm

item.title: Hyvää huomenta!
item.description:
Yawn. Who else didn't want to get up this morning?
But, needed to bathe
And the coffee won't make itself.
This picture. Why do I feel like we're about to have an uncomfortable talk?
The tinier loves holding Frank. He's so soft.
Bonus video clip of him enjoying a strawberry. They aren't poisonous for cats. We checked. Hope your Thursday is going well. One more day until the weekend. Did anyone else's week go by really fast?
item.dc:creator: FrankTheKitten

item.title: Totally invisible
item.description: Like it just dont exist
item.dc:creator: Pentjotal

item.title: Save Students Some Money
item.description: Let's pass the savings along. I hope you people in usersub have a great rest of your day. google "textbookname":pdf https://openstax.org/ https://archive.org/ http://textbooknova.com http://www.gutenberg.org http://www.manybooks.net http://oll.libertyfund.org/ https://readnest.site/ https://www.sciencedirect.com/ https://www.scipublications.com/ https://libgen.li https://oceanofpdf.com/ If you have a digital code to access coursework work then you're screwed. Feel free to comment to add more databases, pre-reviewed, open-source sites for all to use Edit: adding more URL's from you beautiful idiots
item.dc:creator: Lithens

item.title: Arnold Schwarzenegger "Don't be shy no time for that" You're all on the World Stage

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.69 KILLER SMILE
item.description:
COVER ARTIST:
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Knives n Cherries - Minthaze YouTube: https://youtu.be/yTMbyKKWXe8?si=FeqZMOE_N580GZMn Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/77VxYPkW6BOQvhpGrrsEBw?si=7546d5053c134716
Guilty as charged.
InHyuk Lee
Hafez Yadollahi
Evgeny Yurichev
Samet Dareli
GA IS
Hadi Karimi
Egor Kapustin
Leslie Van Den Broeck
Peter Xiao Do you want Hentai? This is how you get Hentai.
Hong Soonsang
Grafit Studio
Zeen Chin
Jordan Grimmer
Volta
Igor Sid
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Eugene the senior rescue dog got to live his last days in a loving forever home!
item.description: RIP Eugene, you were the goodest! Senior dogs will always have a special place in my heart.
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1415 (suspiciously curved path)
item.description:
Let's get this bread
I've recovered from the mood of being fired from the meadery because I really did give it an honest effort. I tried my best. Thanks, Ron. I mean, now it's the hell of job applications, but still.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Good morning. I love you. ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
